body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent-arising** (Phase 6) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Dependent-arising to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Astrocytes and Tinnitus.** — Brain Sci. PMID: 39766412. DOI: 10.3390/brainsci14121213. Tinnitus is correlated with anomalies of neural plasticity and has been found to be affected by inflammatory status. The current theories on tinnitus, although still somewhat incomplete, are based on maladaptive plasticity mechanisms. Astrocytes play amajor role in both neural responses to inflammation and plasticity regulation; moreover, they have recently been discovered to encode "context" for neuronal circuits, which is similar to the "expectation" of Bayesian brain models.
